name: Alligator Sauce Piquant-3
recipeIngredient: 30 pounds alligator meat, chopped into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a roux by cooking it slowly until browned, being careful not to burn it.
2. Add the onions, peppers, celery, and garlic to the roux. Cook for 10 to 20 minutes.
3. Stir in water, tomato sauce, soup, bay leaves, and sugar. Simmer this mixture for approximately 1 hour, stirring every 10 minutes.
4. Incorporate the alligator meat into the mixture and continue cooking for another hour.
5. Add the green onions when the meat is tender and cook for an additional 1/2 hour.
6. This recipe serves 90 to 120 people.
7. Festival: St. Philomena Cajun Country Festival; September 8-10, 1995.
